product_name: Daily Shopify Profit and Anomaly Digest
recommendation: Cut the proposed broad analytics suite down to a single-purpose daily reporting product for Shopify merchants.
target_user: Small Shopify merchants and lean ecommerce teams who manually check store performance each day.
core_job: Show what changed yesterday in sales and margin-related metrics and flag issues that need attention.
positioning: Daily Shopify performance email with automatic anomaly detection.
roadmap: Phase 2: add one ads source if strongly requested
Phase 3: add lightweight drill-downs for products, discounts, and refunds
success_criteria: first digest delivered immediately or next morning
report is understandable without setup work
alerts are useful and not noisy
product replaces manual daily performance checks
